{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032112402813B6655C79600D342272"}"},"total":8},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7593117117807756056","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"才发现作者这部小说应该借鉴了日轻小说《乐园NOISE》。一刻也没有为这部小说腰斩而悲伤，下一个是日轻《乐意NOISE》。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767962671,"group_id":"7551620296541752382","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0y4uJZ0IWsHZpatLbdcBSE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dce9ec0c8e03478d9aee500aa5d53280~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618912&x-signature=rE0Rqf2MRLgz3UVK5lbCE9a9pec%3D","user_id":"572169314638877","user_name":"爱吃香煎红衫鱼的聂筠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"572169314638877","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7551620296541752382","book_info":{"abstract":"转生到二次元的综漫世界，本想着靠音乐，小说赚取大钱然后休闲渡过一生。
写小说没有灵感，音乐无人问津。
只能在网络上搞擦边。
秦直上传了，他穿着水手服弹奏「酸乐」爵士乐视频。
从视频里看，一个女生只露大腿和锁骨弹奏着吉他、钢琴、贝斯。
只能靠这样，骗...赚点零花钱生活。
女装被平冢静老师发现，以此威胁他为那群女孩进行乐队支援。
秦直陷入被抓住弱点随意使唤的窘境...平静的生活已经渐离渐远。
拥有查看作品爆火潜力。
只要与女孩接触便能获得对方身上技能的金手指。
秦直：
“你们二次元的皇帝回来啦！”
秦直感到苦恼：“明明没有才华大家却觉得我是天才..她们怎么越来越不对劲。”
高松灯：说好的组建一辈子乐队。
丰川祥子：直君，我们永远在一起就好了，mujica什么的不重要。
为了高品质单身生活，绝对不会和她们一起——复杂苦涩的青春生活上演
（缝合综漫：春物-GBC-mygo-路人女主-俄妹-败犬等）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o0f6f866e34f648adb19c5812b77d7e1a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"寡人要御驾亲征","author_id":"","book_id":"7551620296541752382","book_name":"综漫：她们好像都喜欢我","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#603820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7555997772277613080","read_count":"102","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"110297"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"51","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,轻小说,系统,二次元,多女主,综漫,天才","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o0f6f866e34f648adb19c5812b77d7e1a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779252029&x-signature=W9G7DVgo0pldX%2FybUavBspkA4TI%3D",
